content: Remote OK SEO Content Writer Inspira Education <p><strong>About Inspira Education</strong></p><p>Inspira Education Group is one of the fastest-growing edtech startups in the US. We started with a simple mission to democratize access to high-quality coaching so that every student in the world has an equal opportunity to access the best opportunities.&nbsp;</p><p>As the world芒聙聶s leading network of top admissions coaches in medical, legal, business, and college studies, we芒聙聶re building software and services in one place芒聙聰disrupting long-entrenched application processes with products and experiences that strive to provide an equal platform for candidates from diverse backgrounds worldwide.&nbsp;</p><p>As one of the fastest-growing edtech firms in the world, we are backed by some of the leading venture capital firms and investors in the world, including Zeev Ventures, Quiet Capital, Craft Ventures and Jeff Fluhr (Founder of Stubhub).</p><p><strong>The Role</strong></p><p>We are currently seeking a creative and detail-oriented SEO Content Writer to join our growing marketing team. In this role, you will be at the intersection of content creation, SEO strategy, and brand storytelling芒聙聰helping us attract, educate, and convert prospective students across Inspira Education Group芒聙聶s family of brands (Inspira Advantage, Quad Education, and Juris Education).</p><p>You芒聙聶ll work closely with SEO strategists, subject matter experts, and senior writers to develop high-quality content that performs well in both traditional search engines and emerging generative AI platforms. From long-form guides and thought-leadership blogs to optimized landing pages and case studies, your work will shape how students and families discover and engage with our services at critical decision-making moments.</p><p>This role is best suited for someone who thrives on balancing creativity with structure芒聙聰crafting engaging, human-centered narratives while rigorously applying SEO and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) best practices. As part of a fast-paced, rapid-growth team, you芒聙聶ll have the opportunity to experiment with new formats, expand your expertise in h teaching, exec, writer Remote, USA 2026-06-13T06:00:22+00:00 1133357 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-seo-content-writer-inspira-education-1133357 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Customer Experience Associate Ollie Ollie was born with the mission of improving the lives of pets and pet parents nationwide. We make human-grade pet food, tailored for each dog芒聙聶s nutritional needs, and deliver directly to our customers芒聙聶 doors. Through Ollie芒聙聶s carefully crafted meals and health services for members, dogs can truly live their healthiest, happiest lives.<br><br>As a member of our growing team, you芒聙聶ll take part in a company culture that cares deeply about its work and its team members.<br><br><strong>Come join the Ollie Canine Care team! <br><br></strong>Ollie is driven to make pets芒聙聶 lives healthier by making freshly-cooked, human-grade food for dogs that芒聙聶s delivered right to our customers&apos; doorsteps. And our customers want the very best for their dogs. Together, we芒聙聶re hoping to embark (no pun intended) on some very long healthy journeys for our dogs powered by good fresh food.<br><br>Our mission is to help dogs live their best lives. To know them is to love them. We want to create a world-class genuinely-kind anticipatory Customer Experience to help meet dogs and their parent&apos;s wellness needs.<br><br><strong>That芒聙聶s where you come in芒聙娄<br><br></strong>We芒聙聶re looking for new members to join our Canine Care team, a small-knit pack that serves Ollie芒聙聶s best pups and their parents to our high-quality standards. We make sure that, from box to bowl, all our dogs (and our customers) are having the best experience possible.<br><br>This role will report to the Customer Experience Shift Manager. While we&apos;re currently hiring for fully remote positions, we will expect to co-locate this team in Salt Lake City when the time is appropriate, and are seeking candidates in or local to Salt Lake City.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities: <br><br></strong><ul><li>Represent the Ollie brand voice to our current and prospective customers</li><li>Deliver a memorable customer experience that helps to build long-term relationships with our pups and their pet parents</li><li>Manage customer relationships across multiple channels, including emails, phones, our order management system, and more!</li><li>Accurately track and monitor customer feedback and interactions</li><li>Help drive initiatives to accomplish our CX Vision of creating a world-class genuinely kind customer experience</li><li>Help to develop agents not only in their KPIs and role but their career development</li><li>Develop and lead projects and initiatives that improve the Ollie experience in Canine Care and beyond!<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>About You:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Put pets first. You love dogs and approach every dog with the same empathy and understanding as if it were your own</li><li>Value patience. You leverage your knowledge and communication skills (written and oral) to provide the best answers to our pup parents芒聙聶 many questions</li><li>Improvisation. You like finding new ways to tackle challenges, and nothing catches you off guard. You prefer guardrails to rules. </li><li>Problem solver. Cutting through to the core of a problem and figuring out how to fix it energizes you. </li><li>Fun. You don芒聙聶t mind occasional sloppy dog kisses and love sharing memes<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Other Experience: <br><br></strong><ul><li>Bachelor芒聙聶s Degree from an accredited four-year college or university</li><li>Previous experience in customer-centric roles (retail, food service, etc.)</li><li>Experience with pets or health-foods preferred</li><li>Experience with Gladly or a similar platform a plus</li><li>Interest in working in a pet-friendly, fast-moving environment<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong><ul><li>Competitive hourly salary and an annual bonus potential</li><li>Sponsored 401k program with employer match up to 4%</li><li>Comprehensive health coverage including medical, dental and vision</li><li>Paid parental leave</li><li>1-week paw-ternity leave for new dog parents</li><li>Ollie subscription for one dog</li><li>Inspiring pack members!<br><br><br></li></ul><em>If you&apos;d like to stand out, tell us in your cover letter why you&apos;re interested in joining Ollie and how your skills match the responsibilities detailed in this posting. <br><br></em><em>Ollie embraces diversity and equal opportunity. We&apos;re committed to building a team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. Ollie is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status. For individuals with disabilities who would like to request an accommodation, please include that in your application.<br><br></em>We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools
